articles.headline: SWIFT launches blockchain shared ledger with 16 banks to speed cross-border payments
articles.summary: SWIFT has launched a blockchain-based shared ledger with an initial group of 16 banks, including Citi and HSBC, to enable round-the-clock payments. For businesses, this could eventually mean faster settlement, lower friction in international trade, and more competition for stablecoin-based payment rails.

articles.headline: Microsoft strikes a multibillion-dollar compute deal with Mistral
articles.summary: Microsoft reached a multibillion-dollar deal to rent AI infrastructure from Mistral, underscoring how quickly demand for compute capacity is becoming a strategic enterprise issue. The deal matters for business leaders because it reflects the rising cost and importance of AI infrastructure, especially for firms evaluating cloud spending and vendor dependence.

articles.headline: Nvidia releases Cosmos 3 Edge, a local-run physical AI model enabling robots to operate without data centers
articles.summary: Nvidia launched Cosmos 3 Edge, a 4B-parameter open-source AI model that runs locally on devices, allowing robots to understand their environment without cloud dependency—reducing latency, cutting cloud costs, and enhancing operational efficiency for automation deployments [1][9].
